metadata.title: Spooldex Tracker
metadata.description: Open filament price tracking across Europe and beyond. Compare current offers, track freshness, and discover where to buy popular 3D printing materials.

footer.tagline: Built for public discovery first, Spooldex integration second.

home.badge: Open filament price tracker · DE market first
home.title: Compare filament offers without waiting for marketplaces to approve you first.
home.description: Spooldex Tracker starts with open shop coverage, freshness timestamps, and public landing pages that can rank. Phase 1 is about discovery and trust, not gated affiliate APIs.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search Bambu PLA Basic, Prusament PETG...

materialsIndex.metaDescription: Browse tracked filament materials first, then drill into live price pages for the exact material you want.
materialsIndex.title: Start with the material, then drill into the exact spool.
materialsIndex.description: This is the clean entry point the tracker was missing. Pick PLA, PETG, ABS, or a specialty blend first, then move into the live filament pages from there.

materialDetail.metaDescription: Tracked {material} filament offers and price comparisons.
materialDetail.description: Public comparison pages for {material} offers, designed to rank and to help users understand current single-spool and pack pricing.

brand.metaDescription: Live offer tracking for {brand} filament across all regions.
brand.description: All tracked offers for {brand}, grouped into one place so you can compare materials and colors without bouncing between shop search pages.

filament.noPriceChange: No price change detected yet. Tracking since {date}.
filament.noSnapshots: No snapshots recorded yet for this page.

shopsIndex.metaDescription: See which filament retailers are currently covered by Spooldex Tracker, how many live offers each shop contributes, and when they were last checked.
shopsIndex.title: All shops currently tracked by Spooldex.
shopsIndex.description: This index shows every live retailer we track, including how broad the coverage is and whether pack offers are available.
shopsIndex.noOffers: No priced offers published yet for this shop.

shopDetail.metaDescription: Tracked offers currently visible on {shop} with live price updates.
shopDetail.description: Offer freshness and landing pages from {shop}, refreshed by the tracker worker and surfaced for public discovery.

offers.noOffers: No tracked offers yet for this filament.

regions.label: Region
regions.noShopsYet: No shops tracked for this region yet. We are expanding coverage.
